overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on a futuristic metro train through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The train travels through elevated tracks, industrial districts, and neon-lit underpasses before arriving at a station platform. The scene features the game's signature cyberpunk aesthetic with hazy night atmosphere and artificial lighting.

agents.ego_description: standing inside the metro train looking out the front window at the tracks ahead

notable_agents.action: passenger standing and holding the overhead rail
passenger looking out the window at the city

entered.detail: rows of empty seats along the left side of the train car

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a futuristic metro train with standing passengers visible. The camera looks forward through the front window at the elevated tracks ahead, with the interior lighting creating a warm artificial glow against the dark city outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro track passing industrial district

events.description: view shifts from interior focus to exterior cityscape as train moves along elevated track
train passes large industrial building with red warning lights on the roof

agents.ego_description: observing the industrial cityscape from the moving train

notable_agents.action: train conductor standing near the front controls

multi-lane highway running parallel to the train tracks
distant buildings and structures visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The train moves along elevated tracks through an industrial district. A large maintenance building with red warning lights passes by on the right, while an elevated highway runs parallel on the left. The view opens up to show the distant city skyline through the hazy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated railway with panoramic city view

events.description: distant neon-lit skyscrapers become visible through the haze

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride while observing the neon-lit skyline in the distance

entered.detail: tall buildings illuminated with blue and red neon lights in the distance
large warehouse structure with corrugated metal siding

segments.scene_description: The train continues through an open section of track with panoramic views of Night City. Neon-lit skyscrapers pierce the hazy sky in the distance, while industrial warehouses line the right side of the tracks.

events.description: train enters covered underpass with graffiti-covered walls and digital billboards
large structural beam temporarily blocks view of the city ahead

agents.ego_description: passing through the underpass section with neon advertisements and graffiti visible

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement screen showing Chromaticore beverage branding
concrete wall covered in red and cyan graffiti art
massive structural pillars supporting the overpass above

segments.scene_description: The train enters a covered underpass section where the view becomes enclosed by concrete walls covered in vibrant graffiti. Digital billboards displaying advertisements illuminate the left side, while massive support beams structure the corridor.

events.description: train slows down significantly as it approaches the station platform
camera pans left to show seated passengers inside the train car

agents.ego_description: arriving at the station and observing seated fellow passengers as the train stops

notable_agents.action: seated passenger looking at a handheld device
seated passenger wearing a red cap looking forward

entered.detail: concrete platform with safety markings where passengers wait
patterned fabric seats inside the train car
illuminated vending machine on the station platform

segments.scene_description: The train slows to a stop at a station platform. The camera pans to reveal seated passengers inside the car, including individuals looking at devices. Through the window, the station platform and vending machines are visible as the train comes to rest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the interior of a futuristic metro train through an expansive industrial cityscape and into a confined urban station. It begins looking forward through the front window past standing passengers, where the warm interior glow contrasts with the dark, elevated tracks ahead. As the train glides through an industrial district, the view opens up to reveal a maintenance building with red warning lights and a parallel highway before expanding into a panoramic vista of neon-lit skyscrapers piercing a hazy night sky. The scene then shifts abruptly as the train enters a covered underpass, where the open horizon is replaced by concrete walls layered with vibrant graffiti and glowing digital billboards. Finally, the train slows to a halt at a station platform, with the camera panning inward to show seated passengers and their devices before settling on the vending machines visible through the window.
